title: hemerocallis major
intro: Hemerocallis major, also known as the large daylily or tiger lily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the lily family (Hemerocallidaceae). The plant's rhizomes have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemerocallis major include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
